title: Easy Woolly Mammoth Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Woolly Mammoth Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Download this simple cartoon Woolly Mammoth coloring sheet for toddlers and preschool kids. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Woolly Mammoth coexisted with early humans, who hunted them for meat and used their bones and tusks to build shelters.
Woolly Mammoth lived during the Ice Age and was covered in thick shaggy fur with a layer of fat up to 3 inches thick to survive the cold.
